subcodes.first_line: That is the Book which guideth unto righteousness, and God hath made it a testimony and a remembrance unto all who dwell in the heavens and on earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذلک الکتاب یهدی الی الرشد و جعله الله حجه و ذکری لمن فی السموات و الارضین لا
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Imam Husayn
